title: No Explosion
description: Removes explosion particles, good for Crystal PvP
body: This resource pack removes particles from explosions. Many Crystal PvP texture packs do this such as Marlow's. This is like a standalone version of that. It is incredibly good for Crystal PvP as it gets rid of distractions clouding up your vision which could also prevent you seeing the enemy coming in for a hit crystal or pearling away. You will not need to download a specific version as this is a resource pack.
